inputs.label: Wine Acidity
inputs.businessContext: Perceived acidity of the wine, where 0 is flat and 10 is very tart.

businessContext_i18n.en: Perceived acidity of the wine, where 0 is flat and 10 is very tart.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şarabın algılanan asitliği, 0 yavan, 10 çok ekşi
businessContext_i18n.de: Wahrgenommene Säure des Weins, wobei 0 für flach und 10 für sehr herb steht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Acidité perçue du vin, où 0 est plat et 10 est très acide.
businessContext_i18n.es: Acidez percibida del vino, donde 0 es plano y 10 es muy ácido.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحموضة المدركة للنبيذ، حيث 0 تعني غير حامضي و10 تعني حامضي جداً.

inputs.label: Wine Sweetness
inputs.businessContext: Perceived sweetness of the wine, where 0 is bone-dry and 10 is very sweet.

businessContext_i18n.en: Perceived sweetness of the wine, where 0 is bone-dry and 10 is very sweet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şarabın algılanan tatlılığı, 0 sek, 10 çok tatlı
businessContext_i18n.de: Wahrgenommene Süße des Weins, wobei 0 für trocken und 10 für sehr süß steht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sucrosité perçue du vin, où 0 est très sec et 10 est très sucré.
businessContext_i18n.es: Dulzor percibido del vino, donde 0 es seco y 10 es muy dulce.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحلاوة المدركة للنبيذ، حيث 0 تعني جاف جداً و10 تعني حلو جداً.

inputs.label: Wine Body
inputs.businessContext: Body or weight of the wine on the palate, where 0 is light and 10 is full-bodied.

businessContext_i18n.en: Body or weight of the wine on the palate, where 0 is light and 10 is full-bodied.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şarabın damakta hissedilen ağırlığı, 0 hafif, 10 dolgun
businessContext_i18n.de: Körper oder Gewicht des Weins am Gaumen, wobei 0 für leicht und 10 für vollmundig steht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Corps ou poids du vin en bouche, où 0 est léger et 10 est corsé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cuerpo o peso del vino en el paladar, donde 0 es ligero y 10 es completo.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قوام أو وزن النبيذ على الحنك، حيث 0 خفيف و10 كثيف.

inputs.label: Food Acidity
inputs.businessContext: Perceived acidity of the food, where 0 is bland and 10 is sharply acidic.

businessContext_i18n.en: Perceived acidity of the food, where 0 is bland and 10 is sharply acidic.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yiyeceğin algılanan asitliği, 0 yavan, 10 keskin asidik
businessContext_i18n.de: Wahrgenommene Säure des Essens, wobei 0 für mild und 10 für stark sauer steht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Acidité perçue de l'aliment, où 0 est fade et 10 est très acide.
businessContext_i18n.es: Acidez percibida del alimento, donde 0 es insípido y 10 es muy ácido.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحموضة المدركة للطعام، حيث 0 خفيف و10 حامضي حاد.

inputs.label: Food Sweetness
inputs.businessContext: Perceived sweetness of the food, where 0 is savory and 10 is dessert-like.

businessContext_i18n.en: Perceived sweetness of the food, where 0 is savory and 10 is dessert-like.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yiyeceğin algılanan tatlılığı, 0 tuzlu, 10 tatlı benzeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wahrgenommene Süße des Lebensmittels, wobei 0 herzhaft und 10 dessertartig ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sucrosité perçue de l'aliment, où 0 est salé et 10 est comme un dessert.
businessContext_i18n.es: Dulzor percibido del alimento, donde 0 es salado y 10 es como un postre.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحلاوة المدركة للطعام، حيث 0 مالح و10 شبيه بالحلوى.

inputs.label: Food Richness
inputs.businessContext: Richness or fattiness of the food, where 0 is lean and 10 is very heavy.

businessContext_i18n.en: Richness or fattiness of the food, where 0 is lean and 10 is very heavy.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yiyeceğin zenginliği veya yağlılığı, 0 yağsız, 10 çok ağır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Reichhaltigkeit oder Fettigkeit des Lebensmittels, wobei 0 mager und 10 sehr schwer ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Richesse ou teneur en matières grasses de l'aliment, où 0 est maigre et 10 est très lourd.
businessContext_i18n.es: Riqueza o contenido graso del alimento, donde 0 es magro y 10 es muy pesado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الدهنية أو الدسامة للطعام، حيث 0 قليل الدهن و10 ثقيل جداً.

hiddenLossDrivers: Model uses normalized input chain — validate units
